in Weekly Demolition Reports 24/09/2022
Global economy is knocked off course by soaring inflation, energy crisis and threats of a potential nuclear war
Source: Best Oasis Limited

#PartneringWithTheBest
16 September - 23 September 2022
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the Week
Global economy is knocked off course by soaring inflation, energy crisis and threats of a potential nuclear war, resulting in a sharp decline in
economic activities across many regions. There is a downward pressure on ferrous scrap prices across all major recycling destinations due to slower
end-user industry demands, thereby dampening the sentiments for ship recyclers. With elongating trade routes and growing supply chain woes,
ocean freight rates do not appear to be returning to the pre-pandemic levels anytime soon, making it difficult to predict
